title: salsola pseudotragus
intro: Salsola pseudotragus, also known as Russian thistle or prickly saltwort, is a type of succulent plant native to Eastern Europe and Russia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. Salsola pseudotragus is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and improving kidney function, due to its high content of minerals like potassium and sodium. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
